Name: [DATA ERROR]- EPDS adjusted age has negative values
Status: Lasso to review and ensure WG knows
RTDs Text (markdown format): N=2 participants in `pex_bm_epds` have a biologically implausible adjusted age of -1 at V02. Until corrected, please exclude from analyses.

Name: Tabulated MRI: correct subdomain field in JSONs for 6 XCP-D files
Status: Lasso to review and ensure WG knows
RTDs Text (markdown format): The sidecar JSONs for Myers-Labonte-parcellated structural measures in the tabulated XCP-D derivatives should have a `sub_domain` value of `Structural MRI`, not `Resting State fMR`: `img_xcpd_hash-{X}_space-fsLR_seg-MyersLabonte_stat-mean_desc-_morph`. The Data Dictionary available via the NBDC Dictionary Query Tool is correct.

RTDs Text (markdown format): Weeks for postnatal recruits were mistakenly reported in the TLFB **versions 1** or **2** instead of [**version 3** adapted for PNR](https://docs.hbcdstudy.org/latest/instruments/pregexp/su/tlfb/#v3). These will be adjusted to **version 3**.

add unit for nails_results_nail_weight variable

Name: All decline to answer will still report as zero - eHITS
RTDs Text (markdown format): In `sed_bm_ehits`, participants who did not respond to any questions have a summary score of 0 instead of missing. Until corrected, users should convert these cases to blank/null prior to conducting analyses.

Name: [MISSING VARIABLE]- sed_bm_demo_residence_001 and _002
RTDs Text (markdown format): The variables `sed_bm_demo_residence_{001|002}`, present in the prior release, are missing in the current release and will be added back.

Name: [DATA DICTIONARY ERROR]- remove " " from biospecimen table levels
RTDs Text (markdown format): Note that the data dictionary level values have quotes around them (for example; 1= "positive" instead of 1=positive), causing the downloaded data dictionary to have double quotes (e.g. 1=""positive"").

Name: [DATA DICTIONARY ERROR]- APA Mania
RTDs Text (markdown format): Note that `pex_bm_apa_mania_001` through `mania_005` have incorrect Data Dictionary descriptions.

Name: [SCORING ERROR]- APA individual items present, but no score
RTDs Text (markdown format): There are cases where APA Level 2 was administered against gating logic (e.g. for Repetitive Behavior despite there being missing Level 1 responses). As Level 2 administration was not expected, these are not scored (score = "No additional inquiry required") despite having Level 2 item responses present. The Level 2 item-level data will be removed in the future to prevent confusion.

Name: [ADD FIELD]- language field for Vineland (distinct from "language of administration" field to be implemented consortium-wide)
RTDs Text (markdown format): Addition of language field to `ncl_cg_vabs`.

Name: [SCORING CORRECTION NEEDED]- current PACEs
RTDs Text (markdown format): Summary scores for `sed_bm_paces` are currently calculated as the sum of individual item responses rather than the average. This will be corrected in a future release. In the meantime, users may compute their own average-based summary scores using the item-level data provided in the dataset.

Name: EEG file was not re-id'd (put in RTD) need to dig into how it happened -
[DATA ERROR] - 2 corrupt files in MRI raw BIDS (func)
RTDs Text (markdown format): There are 2 corrupted raw BIDS files (V02 bold runs under session-level `func/` folders of `rawdata/`) to be resolved. Impacted participant IDs/filepaths are available to DUC-authorized users via the [HBCD Private Release Notes](https://hbcd-docs-private.lassoinformatics.com/#download).

Name: [DATA ERROR]- age fields in EEG data
RTDs Text (markdown format): Chronological and adjusted age are inaccurate for N=74 participants at V03 due to site data entry errors, causing there to be ages that fall outside of the expected age range (3-9 months). Until resolved, please exclude age values that fall outside of the expected age range from your analyses.
